free_text: (d,a) reactions on C-12, O-16 and Mg-24.
The 119 cm cyclotron was used.
The alpha particles were detected by means of a
fast ionization chamber of the electron collection
type. The detector was put in the target room near the
scattering chamber.
Data digitizing error
Error from the graphic bars
Data are given in counts for 90 mu-C.
The target of C-12 was prepared by cracking methyl
iodide (CH3I) on a thin tantalum strip.
Secondary energy digitizing error
Fig.3
Data are given in counts for 250 mu-C.
The target used was 6 mu-m mylar C-10(H2O) coated on
both its surfaces with an evaporated gold film to avoid
possible wrinkles due to the heating by the beam.
Secondary energy digitizing error
Fig.4
Data are given in counts for 600 mu-C.
The target used was a layer of magnesium of thickness
0.3 mg/cm2 on a supporting gold foil of 0.2 mg/cm2.
